title.en: Development, testing, staging and production environments

group-parts.group: Development, testing, staging and production environments
group-parts.name: overview

prose.en: Segregating development, testing, staging and production environments, and their associated data, can minimise the likelihood of faulty or malicious content being introduced into a production environment. Furthermore, protecting the authoritative source for software is critical to preventing malicious content being surreptitiously introduced into software.
